entries.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
entries.description: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown

entries.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
entries.description: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery

entries.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
entries.description: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh

entries.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
entries.description: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower

entries.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
entries.description: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron

entries.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
entries.description: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert

entries.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
entries.description: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps

entries.title: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
entries.description: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis

entries.title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
entries.description: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius

entries.title: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
entries.description: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain

entries.title: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
entries.description: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie

entries.title: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
entries.description: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell

entries.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
entries.description: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin

entries.title: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
entries.description: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson

entries.title: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
entries.description: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc

entries.title: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
entries.description: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann

entries.title: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
entries.description: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton

entries.title: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
entries.description: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger

entries.title: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
entries.description: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty

entries.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
entries.description: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz

entries.title: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
entries.description: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson

entries.title: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
entries.description: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman

entries.title: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
entries.description: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein

entries.title: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
entries.description: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey

entries.title: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
entries.description: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell

entries.title: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
entries.description: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros

entries.title: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
entries.description: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield

entries.title: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
entries.description: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson

entries.title: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morr
entries.description: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morrison
